article_title: Bylaw 14745 — Housing Agreement (6263 abd 6337 Cassie Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby locks in affordable rental rules for 38-storey Cassie Avenue development
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council adopted Bylaw 14745, a housing agreement requiring Willingdon Avenue Investments Ltd. to provide non-market (below-market-rate) rental units in its new development at 6263–6337 Cassie Avenue, with rent and tenant eligibility conditions tied to the property title permanently.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Tenant
